zh.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne是Adélaïde de BRABANT的兒子，於1227年出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德。他於1245年與Eléonore de Baffie結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1276年12月11日在他的家鄉享年49歲，埋葬在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o倫德-吉布隆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne是Adélaïde de BRABANT的儿子，于1227年出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o可勒爾蒙吉福藍德。他于1245年与Eléonore de Baffie结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1276年12月11日在他的家乡享年49岁，埋葬在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯普-德-o倫德-吉布隆。

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne was born in 1227, in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France as the son of Adélaïde de BRABANT. He married Eléonore de Baffie in 1245. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 11 December 1276, in his hometown, at the age of 49, and was buried in Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne est né en 1227, à Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, fils de Adélaïde de BRABANT. Il a épousé Eléonore de Baffie en 1245. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 11 décembre 1276, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France.

de.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne wurde 1227 in Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich, als Sohn von Adélaïde de BRABANT geboren. Er hat 1245 Eléonore de Baffie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 11. Dezember 1276 im Alter von 49 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne è nato il nel 1227 nel Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia come figlio di Adélaïde de BRABANT. Lui sposato Eléonore de Baffie nel 1245. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 11 dicembre 1276, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergneは1227年にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメクラーモント-フエランドでAdélaïde de BRABANTの息子として生まれた。1245年にEléonore de Baffieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1276年12月11日に故郷で49歳で死去し，フランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスプウイ-デ-ドoメイロンデ-エト-ブロンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne(은)는 1227년 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 클레몽-페랜드에서 Adélaïde de BRABANT의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1245년 Eléonore de Baffie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1276년 12월 11일 그의 고향에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 푸이-데-드o 이론데-트-버에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne nasceu em 1227, em Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França filho de Adélaïde de BRABANT. Ele casou-se com Eléonore de Baffie em 1245. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de dezembro de 1276, em sua cidade natal, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne родился в 1227 г. в местности клирмонт-фирранд, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. Его мать звали Adélaïde de BRABANT. Он женился на женщине по имени Eléonore de Baffie в 1245 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 11 декабря 1276 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности иронде-ет-бурон, пуи-де-дoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Robert V d'Auvergne nació en 1227, en Clermont-Ferrand, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia como hijo de Adélaïde de BRABANT. Se casó con Eléonore de Baffie en 1245. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 11 de diciembre de 1276, en su pueblo, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Yronde-et-Buron, Puy-de-Dôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia.
